title: catabrosa pumila
intro: Catabrosa pumila, also known as small hair grass or dwarf hair grass, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the grass family and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Catabrosa pumila is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating coughs and sore throats, and aiding digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is sometimes used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
